DOIGenerationForm.title: DOI Title
DOIGenerationForm.techniques_subjects_help_tooltip: Please provide as many subjects as you can, including one or more techniques used to generate your data. These can be in the form of short Subject strings (using Enter to confirm a subject), but your data publication will be more FAIR if you are able to select terms from community vocabularies/taxonomies. If your data were generated by the Diamond light source (not electron microscopes, for example) then please try to select one or more terms from the PaNET Photon and Neutron Experimental Techniques Ontology using the tool below.
DOIGenerationForm.technique_dialog_initial_help: Please search for a technique and select the technique that matches or is more general
DOIGenerationForm.technique_dialog_select_technique_help: Please select the most relevant technique from the list below
DOIGenerationForm.review_metadata: Please review the metadata that will be sent to DataCite before minting your DOI
